name: iGolf Easton
about: iGolf Easton is a facility featuring 5 HD Golf simulator bays, designed for both casual play and serious practice. Each bay includes oversized private spaces with Real Feel hit mats, private TVs, and bar tops for food and drink. The venue offers a full service bar, golf leagues, and event hosting capabilities. Simulators are rented in 30-minute increments, with pricing per bay rather than per person. A casual dress code is enforced, prohibiting tank tops and work boots.
why_golfers_like_it: HD Golf simulators provide an incredibly realistic and accurate playing experience
Over 40 courses to choose from with various games and skill challenges
Full service bar allows for socializing and cocktails during play
iGolf handicap system based on the World Handicap System for competitive play
Private, oversized bays with TVs and bar tops enhance the comfort and experience

food_and_drink.notes: Bar tops available for food consumption, though it does not appear to have an on-site kitchen

simulator_hardware.notes: 5 HD Golf simulator bays featuring Real Feel hit mats and private TVs

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full service bar and bar tops in the bays for food and drink. It does not specify if outside food or drink is permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes. Simulator time is rented in 30-minute increments.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly policies, amenities, or events on the website.
